_note: Jacob's twelve sons (the tribes) + Dinah, under their four mothers (Genesis 29-30, 35). Leah and Rachel are wives; Bilhah (Rachel's servant) and Zilpah (Leah's servant) are CONCUBINE unions tied back to their mistress, like Hagar->Sarah. Judah already exists (Leah's son, the messianic line) and is appended here. Sorts after 07c so Rachel exists.

children.label:
Reuben
c.1752 BC · Jacob's firstborn, by Leah · Genesis 29:32

Simeon
c.1751 BC · second son of Leah · Genesis 29:33

Levi
c.1750 BC · third son of Leah; the priestly tribe · Genesis 29:34

Issachar
c.1747 BC · son of Leah · Genesis 30:18

Zebulun
c.1746 BC · son of Leah · Genesis 30:20

Joseph
c.1745 BC · Rachel's firstborn; vizier of Egypt · Genesis 30, 37-50

Benjamin
c.1740 BC · Rachel's youngest; she died bearing him · Genesis 35:18

Dan
c.1749 BC · son of Bilhah · Genesis 30:6

Naphtali
c.1748 BC · son of Bilhah · Genesis 30:8

Gad
c.1749 BC · son of Zilpah · Genesis 30:11

Asher
c.1748 BC · son of Zilpah · Genesis 30:13
